data.Name: Fermi Inc.
data.Description: Fermi Inc. (FRMI) is a pioneering technology company specializing in nuclear energy innovations and advanced radiation detection systems. With a strong portfolio of intellectual property and strategic alliances, Fermi Inc. is uniquely positioned to improve safety and operational efficiency in energy production while championing sustainability initiatives. The company's commitment to meeting the increasing global demand for clean and reliable energy solutions underscores its potential as an attractive investment opportunity for institutional investors in the evolving energy landscape.
data.Address: 620 S. TAYLOR ST., AMARILLO, TX, UNITED STATES, 79101
